equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.attunementHint: Magic items you're attuned to, out of your attunement limit (3 by default; Artificers attune to more).
equipment.encumbranceHint: Carried weight out of your carrying capacity (Strength × 15 lb). You can push, drag, or lift up to {{pushDragLift}}. Excludes custom items.
equipment.heavyDisadvantageHint: This Heavy weapon gives you Disadvantage on attack rolls because your Strength or Dexterity is below 13.
equipment.unproficientArmorHint: Your class isn't proficient with this armor: Disadvantage on every Strength + Dexterity ability check, saving throw, and attack roll while wearing it, and you can't cast spells.
equipment.attuneHint: Take a 1h Short Rest to attune (RAW 2024).
equipment.trackUsesHint: Adds a Use button that counts down (e.g. Healer's Kit, 10 uses)
equipment.autoRemoveHint: Item disappears from your list when uses reach 0 (e.g. Potion of Healing)
equipment.partyPotNoCampaign: Party Pot is shared with your campaign group. Join or create a campaign to unlock it.
equipment.emptyBlurb: Weapons, armor, potions, and magic items you add will live here, with their damage, AC, charges, and weight.
